subcodes.first_line: The blessed Lote-Tree is mentioning one of His leaves, that this divine remembrance may cause her to attain the limitless outpourings of God’s grace
subcodes.first_line_orig: سدره مبارکه یکی از ورقات را ذکر مینماید تا ذکر الهی او را بفیوضات نامتناهیه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @love of God, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
